name: source_provenance_unavailable
description: Acceptance fixture #11. The witness passes every per-phrase gate (subject_vendor + negative + primary_driver + grounded + pain_confidence=strong + pain_category) but lacks the excerpt_text and review_id needed for the repository to compute source_excerpt_fingerprint at write time. The validator must surface this as cannot_validate(source_provenance_unavailable) rather than VALID, otherwise the writer's contract guard would raise at upsert time. This is the operational invariant: a 'valid' claim must come with the source provenance Step 5 needs to persist it.

review.review_text: Asana pricing keeps going up at every renewal cycle.
